metadata.title: VoidAd — Your Digital Neutral Zone
metadata.description: DNS-level network security, ad blocking, and privacy protection for every device on your network.

hero.title: Reclaim Your Internet.
hero.subtitle: VoidAd filters threats at the network level — every device on your router is protected automatically. No apps to install. No ads to fund us.

dashboard.title: System-Wide Protection
dashboard.guestPrompt: Sign in to sync protection settings and VoidPoints across devices.

voidpoints.title: Make a Difference with Your VoidPoints
voidpoints.savingsNote: Based on typical data and power savings.

about.title: About VoidAd
about.missionText: VoidAd is an integrated digital security platform built on DNS-level filtering. We protect privacy, block malware and phishing, and turn saved bandwidth into VoidPoints for charity.
about.privacy: Privacy First — zero-log policy, no ad revenue model.
about.security: Network-Wide Security — every connected device protected.
about.social: Social Impact — convert savings into real-world good.
about.hardware: VoidAd-Box — future hardware solution for smart homes (coming soon).
